items.Description:
This invoice is the final billing for the remainder of your maintenance agreement as per the cancellation clause.
 
Contract Quotation No: 128066
Contract Terms: 3 Years
Contract Annual Fee: $690.00 + GST
Contract Total Fee (Annual Fee * 3 Years): $2,070.00 + GST
 
Total Billed from Contract: $ 330.00 + GST (Refer to Tax Invoice #1500011835)
 
Total Balance from the Remainder of Contract: $1,740.00 + GST
 
EARLY CANCELLATION OF AGREEMENT
If this agreement is cancelled prior to it's agreed end date Liverpool Fire Services reserve the right to invoice the client the balance of the agreement for which the client shall be held liable. This is due to pricing is calculated on the length of the agreement.

Job #384048 - 129962
Dear Emma,

Thank you for the opportunity to provide you with a fee proposal to carry out works for your fire protection equipment on site 10A-10B Kenthurst Road Dural.
 
Our proposal includes the following:
LIVERPOOL FIRE SERVICES SCOPE OF WORKS
 
SCOPE OF WORKS
Regular Servicing of Fire Protection Equipment for the above premises in accordance with the relevant Australian Standards, we are pleased to submit the following revised quotation for your approval. This proposal is for 3 years.
 
NOMINATED EQUIPMENT - SIX MONTHLY TESTING
2 x Service Emergency Lights
2 x Service Exit Lights
2 x Service Portable Fire Extinguishers
 
YEARLY SERVICE SUB TOTAL  $480 + GST
 
ANNUAL FIRE SAFETY STATEMENT TESTING & REPORTING
• Annual Fire Safety Statement Audit and Report $450 + GST
 
AFSS & ANNUAL TESTING SUB TOTAL $450 + GST
 
TOTAL FOR SERVICE & AFSS $930 + GST  PER ANNUM
EXCLUSIONS:
Consumables such as Spare Parts, Work outside of normal hours, Anti-Tamper Seals, Maintenance Tags, Repairs to
Serviced Equipment mentioned above, Barcode labels, Monthly testing of Hydrant Systems, Batteries for Fire Indication
Panels and all parts associated with Annual Testing, Pressure Test/Recharge on Extinguishers, 5 yearly Hydrant Tests,
5 Yearly 100% Detection Tests, Fire Plans, Emergency Callouts, Brigade monitoring fee’s, Works in accordance with
Passive Fire and Smoke Containment Systems not mention in the serviced equipment, Annual Survey Reports in
accordance with AS1851 sections 2 – 9 accordingly, Administration Fees, All required Test Books and 5 Yearly Speech
Intelligibility Test on EWIS System. Level 3, Level 4 & Level 5 Services for Extinguishers will be at an additional charge
Please Note:
All equipment must be serviced on the same day if we have to return a fee will apply.
Parking must be provided on-site, otherwise, parking fee will be charged back to the customer 
 
LABOUR RATES
Normal Hours 8 am – 4 pm $ 120.00 per Hour excluding GST
After Hours 4 pm – 8 am $ 210.00 per Hour excluding GST
Site Attendance Fee includes travel and first hour on-site $ 295.00 excluding GST
Normal hours call outs will be billed on the normal hourly rate and will start from the time of the request to attend site
with the minimum billable period being no less than two hours. After Hours call outs will be billed on the after-hours rate
and will start from the time of the request to attend site with the minimum billable period being no less than four hours.

PAYMENT TERMS:
Prior arrangements are to be made with the management of Liverpool Fire Services in regards to payment terms. Management will at their discretion accept 50% upon order and 50% at completion of works prior to certification being issued. New clients will be required to pay 100% for works prior to works being undertaken.
AFTER-HOURS EMERGENCY SERVICE - 02 8078 0316
After hours call outs will be billed on the after-hours rate and will start from the time of the request to attend site with the
minimum billable period being no less than 4 hours. We include all administration costs & travel.
EARLY CANCELLATION OF AGREEMENT
If this agreement is cancelled prior to it's agreed end date Liverpool Fire Services reserve the right to invoice the client the balance of the agreement for which the client shall be held liable. This is due to pricing is calculated on the length of the agreement.
This Quotation is Valid for 30 Days from the created date.
Please note that Liverpool fire services Full Terms and Conditions apply to this Quotation and are available 24/7 
 
ACCEPTANCE:

Thank you for the opportunity to present a free proposal for your site The Dry Dock with the following:
 
Evacuation Diagrams
 
Our proposal will assist your site toward fully complying with the various Planning for Emergencies in Facilities, Australian Standards 3745-2010.
 
 
Site Visit and Inspection
It is important that members of the Emergency Control Organisation and staff understand what support equipment is on site and how it works. To this end an Adair Consultant will attend your site to identify the building's installed equipment, which may include:
 
Emergency Communication Equipment 
Manual and Emergency Call Points 
Hose reels, Hydrants and Fire extinguishers
Exits and paths of Travel
First response equipment such as first aid kits and AEDs (Automatic External Defibrillators)
Any other equipment that may assist in an emergency
The Consultant will also identify the most appropriate locations for 'You Are Here Diagrams' around the facility in consultation with the Site Contact.
 
Development of Floor Plans
The Building Floor Plans and Evacuation Diagrams to be displayed around the building will indicate the following information as required by the Standard:
 
Emergency Exits 
You Are Here Signs
Routes to Assembly Areas
Location of Fire Fighting Equipment
First Aid Equipment Locations
Other relevant details
 
 
In addition to the development of building floor plans a site plan will be developed to identify the location and required route to the Assembly Area.
 All plans will be developed in each orientation in order to allow the addition of 'You Are Here' labels for the Evacuation Diagrams.
 
To finalise the above works Adair will provide the following documentation for your site.
           
1 x Site Attendance Fee
1 x PDF Copy Evacuation Diagrams
1 x Small Site Mark Up

TOTAL COST FOR DEVELOPMENT : $1360.00 + GST
30% DISCOUNT APPLIED: $408.00
TOTAL DISCOUNTED PRICE: $952.00 Plus GST 
 
 
Exclusions:
Amendments due to changes to the building equipment or floor plan layout completed after the Site inspection date
Parking to be provided by client - if parking not provided and extra charges are incurred this will be invoiced.
Additional A3 Framed Evacuation Diagram locations can be supplied at a cost of an additional $99 per diagram plus GST 
 
Variation Policy:
Adair reserve the right to charge a variation on any work not initially included in the Scope of Works and any changes that are made after the mark-up has been supplied or site inspection completed.
 
Warranty Period 
Upon completion of our works, we shall forward the finished product and invoice according to our quoted price and terms of payment.
If you require any diagram modifications that relate to our works within 3 months of our final product dispatch, we shall modify, reprint, and send you the new evacuation diagrams at NIL COST to you upon receipt of payment of the initial invoice by the due date.
 
Amendments due to changes to the building equipment or floor plan layout completed after the Site inspection date are not covered by this warranty.
 
 
Payment Terms:
This amount (50%) is payable on acceptance of quotation (Works will only proceed AFTER receipt of this payment). The remaining (50%) is to be paid on delivery of documentation, unless other payment terms have been arranged.
 
To Proceed with this Quotation:
Please return the below quote acceptance page to the email address that this quote is attached to as soon as possible. Please also note; orders will only be accepted and processed with a valid purchase order number (If applicable).
 
We look forward to your further advice on this matter and assure you of our best attention at all times. Should you have any questions or if you would like to discuss the above proposal, please do not hesitate to contact me.
 
Kind Regards,
 
Jamie Illistom
Business Development divisional manager
jamiei@redadair.com.au
0477538567
